title: solanum pseudocapsicum f. microcarpum
intro: Solanum pseudocapsicum f. microcarpum, also known as the small-fruited Jerusalem cherry, is a subspecies of the Solanum pseudocapsicum plant, which belongs to the nightshade family of flowering plants. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its high concentration of solanine and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Solanum pseudocapsicum f. microcarpum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Solanum pseudocapsicum f. microcarpum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
